title: catevala mirabilis
intro: Catevala mirabilis, also known as the Marvel of Peru, is a flowering plant species in the family Nyctaginaceae, characterized by its unique ability to close its leaves at night and reopen them in the morning. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Catevala mirabilis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Catevala mirabilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
